summary: Tested Quick Access (Brzi pristup) navigation fix and bottom tab bar navigation. All 6 Quick Access icons and all 5 bottom tabs navigate correctly. The fix (HomeTab receiving handleTabChange instead of raw setActiveTab) is verified working.

issues: When navigating to Mapa via Smještaj/Apoteke/Parkinzi quick access, the active filter chip (e.g. Prenoćišta) scrolls off-screen in the horizontal filter bar. Map correctly shows filtered locations (purple pins for Prenoćišta, 3 locations) but filter chip not auto-scrolled into view. Minor UX issue - not a functionality bug.

critical_code_review_comments: Code review confirms the fix is correct: index.tsx line 73 passes handleTabChange (not raw setActiveTab) to HomeTab. handleTabChange also clears mapCategory when switching away from mapa tab.
QUICK array in HomeTab.tsx has correct tab IDs matching TABS array in index.tsx: 'mapa', 'rezervacije', 'emergency' -> router.push('/emergency')
All 6 quick access items are in the DOM and functional
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Access navigation fix verified working. All 6 Brzi pristup icons functional: Restorani->Mapa(restaurant filter), Događaji->Rezervacije tab, Hitni br.->/emergency route, Smještaj->Mapa(prenociste filter), Apoteke->Mapa(pharmacy filter), Parkinzi->Mapa(parking filter). Bottom tab bar: all 5 tabs (Početna, Mapa, Rezervacije, Favoriti, Profil) navigate correctly.

quick_access_dogadjaji.result: PASS - Rezervacije tab active, Vijesti i Događaji screen shown

quick_access_restorani.expected: Navigate to Mapa with restaurant filter
quick_access_restorani.result: PASS - Mapa tab active, Restorani filter applied, 3 red pins visible

quick_access_hitni.result: PASS - URL changed to /emergency, 112 number and Hitni Servisi section visible

quick_access_smjestaj.expected: Navigate to Mapa with prenociste filter
quick_access_smjestaj.result: PASS - Mapa tab active, purple accommodation pins visible (3 lokacija)

quick_access_apoteke.expected: Navigate to Mapa with pharmacy filter
quick_access_apoteke.result: PASS - Mapa tab active, filtered locations shown

quick_access_parkinzi.expected: Navigate to Mapa with parking filter
quick_access_parkinzi.result: PASS - Mapa tab active, 4 blue parking pin locations visible
